# 4 Aces Visa — Immigration Consultancy

> By the immigrants, for the immigrants. 4 Aces Visa is a global immigration consultancy helping people immigrate to Canada, Australia, Germany, and the United Kingdom. 15,000+ successful visas. 98% approval rate. 10+ years experience.

## About

4 Aces Visa is an immigration consultancy founded by immigrants who have personally been through the immigration process. We specialize in Express Entry Canada PR, study visas, work permits, LMIA assistance, Provincial Nominee Programs (PNP), family sponsorship, visitor & super visas, citizenship applications, and more across 4 countries.

- **Countries served**: Canada, Australia, Germany, United Kingdom
- **Success rate**: 98% visa approval rate
- **Visas processed**: 15,000+
- **Experience**: 10+ years
- **Regions**: Punjab, Gujarat, Haryana, Rajasthan (India) and Ontario, British Columbia (Canada) specialists
- **Contact**: sahil280389@gmail.com | +1-647-862-2190 | WhatsApp: +1-647-862-2190
- **Website**: https://www.4acesvisa.com
- **Free Assessment**: https://www.4acesvisa.com/contact

## Services

- [Express Entry PR](https://www.4acesvisa.com/services/express-entry): Canada's flagship PR system. CRS optimization, profile creation, ITA guidance. PR in 6 months.
- [Student Visa](https://www.4acesvisa.com/services/student-visa): DLI admission, study permits, PGWP pathway to PR.
- [LMIA Assistance](https://www.4acesvisa.com/services/lmia-assistance): Labour Market Impact Assessment for Canadian work permits. +50-200 CRS points.
- [PNP Application](https://www.4acesvisa.com/services/pnp-application): Provincial nomination with +600 CRS points for guaranteed PR.
- [Work Permits](https://www.4acesvisa.com/services/work-permits): Open and employer-specific work permits.
- [Family Sponsorship](https://www.4acesvisa.com/services/family-sponsorship): Sponsor spouse, parents, and children.
- [Visitor & Super Visa](https://www.4acesvisa.com/services/visitor-visa): Family visits and 10-year Super Visa for parents/grandparents.
- [Visitor Visa Insurance](https://www.4acesvisa.com/services/visitor-visa-insurance): Mandatory medical coverage for Canada Super Visa.
- [Visa Restoration](https://www.4acesvisa.com/services/visa-restoration): Restore expired immigration status within 90 days.
- [Citizenship Application](https://www.4acesvisa.com/services/citizenship-application): Complete the immigration journey with citizenship.
- [Germany Job Seeker Visa](https://www.4acesvisa.com/services/job-seeker-visa): 6-month visa to search for employment in Germany.

## Document Checklists

Complete visa document checklists prepared by immigration experts — every form number, supporting document, and pro tip for each visa type.

- [Canada PR Documents](https://www.4acesvisa.com/documents/canada-pr): Express Entry, PNP, CEC — identity, ECA, language tests, reference letters, proof of funds, police & medical, IMM forms.
- [Student Visa Documents](https://www.4acesvisa.com/documents/student-visa): LOA, SOP, GIC, transcripts, financial proof, IELTS/TOEFL, SDS requirements.
- [Work Permit Documents](https://www.4acesvisa.com/documents/work-permit): LMIA, job offer, employer docs, PGWP, spousal OWP, NOC alignment.
- [Visitor & Super Visa Documents](https://www.4acesvisa.com/documents/visitor-visa): Invitation letter, ties to home country, Super Visa insurance, LICO proof.
- [Family Sponsorship Documents](https://www.4acesvisa.com/documents/family-sponsorship): Spousal evidence, parent/grandparent MNI, dependent children, IMM forms.
- [PNP Documents](https://www.4acesvisa.com/documents/pnp-application): Provincial-specific requirements for OINP, BC PNP, AINP, SINP, MPNP, AIPP.
- [Citizenship Documents](https://www.4acesvisa.com/documents/citizenship): Physical presence proof, tax compliance, language, CIT forms.
- [Germany Job Seeker Visa Documents](https://www.4acesvisa.com/documents/job-seeker-visa): Chancenkarte points, anabin/ZAB recognition, Sperrkonto, Europass CV.

## Immigration Comparison

- [Canada vs Australia vs Germany vs UK Comparison](https://www.4acesvisa.com/compare): Side-by-side comparison of all four immigration destinations — PR speed, cost, salary, language requirements, and which country is best for Indian applicants.

## Australia Skilled Migration Pages

- [Australia Skilled Migration Hub](https://www.4acesvisa.com/australia/skilled-migration): Complete guide to Subclass 189, 190, and 491 — points test, skills assessment bodies, processing times.
- [Subclass 189 Skilled Independent](https://www.4acesvisa.com/australia/subclass-189): No nomination needed. 90+ points competitive. Permanent from day 1. Processing 12–18 months.
- [Subclass 190 State Nominated](https://www.4acesvisa.com/australia/subclass-190): State nomination adds +5 pts. Permanent from day 1. Must live in nominating state 2 years.
- [Subclass 491 Regional](https://www.4acesvisa.com/australia/subclass-491): Regional nomination adds +15 pts. Provisional 5-year visa. Path to permanent via Subclass 191.

## UK Immigration Pages

- [UK Skilled Worker Visa](https://www.4acesvisa.com/uk/skilled-worker): 70-point system, £26,200 salary threshold, ILR after 5 years. Complete guide.
- [UK Graduate Route](https://www.4acesvisa.com/uk/graduate-route): 2–3 years post-study work, no job offer needed. Transition to Skilled Worker Visa.

## Germany Immigration Pages

- [Germany Chancenkarte Guide](https://www.4acesvisa.com/germany/chancenkarte): Opportunity Card — 6+ points, EUR 12,000 blocked account, 20 hrs/week work while searching.
- [Germany EU Blue Card](https://www.4acesvisa.com/germany/eu-blue-card): EUR 43,759+ salary, PR in 21 months with B1 German, EU-wide mobility after 18 months.

## Free Assessment

Get a free immigration eligibility assessment at [https://www.4acesvisa.com/contact](https://www.4acesvisa.com/contact) or take the [Immigration Pathway Quiz](https://www.4acesvisa.com/quiz).

## FAQ

Visit our comprehensive [FAQ Hub](https://www.4acesvisa.com/faq) with 100+ expert-answered questions across 8 categories: Express Entry & PR, Study Visa, Work Permits & LMIA, Provincial Nominee Programs, Family Sponsorship, Visitor & Super Visa, Australia & Germany, and General Immigration.

**Q: How can I apply for Canada PR from India in 2026?**
A: Three main pathways: Express Entry (FSWP, CEC, FSTP), Provincial Nominee Programs (PNP), or LMIA-based work permits leading to PR. Express Entry is fastest at 6-8 months. Start with IELTS, WES credential assessment, and an Express Entry profile on IRCC.

**Q: What is the minimum CRS score for Canada PR in 2026?**
A: Recent general draws: 430-490. Category-based draws (healthcare, STEM, trades, French): 380-440. PNP nomination adds 600 points, guaranteeing an ITA.

**Q: Which country is easiest for immigration in 2026?**
A: Canada: fastest PR via Express Entry (6 months). Germany: Chancenkarte (Opportunity Card) easiest to obtain with 6 points. Australia: rewards high-skilled professionals (65+ points). UK: efficient with a job offer (Skilled Worker visa, 70 PBS points).

**Q: What are the best courses in Canada for PR in 2026?**
A: Top PR-friendly programs: Computer Science & IT (NOC 21232-21234), Nursing & Healthcare (NOC 31301-31302), Business Analytics & Supply Chain, Early Childhood Education (high PNP demand), Electrical/Mechanical Engineering Technology, Cybersecurity & Cloud Computing, Hospitality Management. Choose 2-year DLI diplomas for 3-year PGWP.

**Q: Which colleges in Canada are best for PR pathway?**
A: Top DLIs: Conestoga College (Ontario), Seneca Polytechnic (Toronto), Douglas College (BC), BCIT (Vancouver), Humber College (Toronto), Fanshawe College (London ON), Saskatchewan Polytechnic, NAIT (Alberta). Look for NOC TEER 0/1/2/3 aligned programs.

**Q: What are the top 5 immigration pathways to Canada in 2026?**
A: 1) Express Entry FSWP — fastest for CLB 7+ skilled workers. 2) PNP — +600 CRS, ideal for moderate scores. 3) LMIA Work Permit → PR — employer-sponsored, +50-200 CRS. 4) Study → PGWP → CEC — best for young applicants. 5) Atlantic Immigration Program (AIP) — employer-driven, lower requirements.

**Q: What is the Atlantic Immigration Program (AIP)?**
A: Employer-driven permanent pathway for New Brunswick, Nova Scotia, PEI, Newfoundland. Requires designated employer job offer, minimum CLB 4 (TEER 0-3) or CLB 5 (TEER 4). No points system — accessible for lower CRS candidates.

**Q: What government settlement programs are available for new immigrants to Canada?**
A: Free IRCC Settlement Programs (language, job help, mentoring), CIIP pre-arrival orientation, Foreign Credential Recognition Program (FCRP), Provincial Settlement Services (ISANS, OCASI), free healthcare, public education, Canada Child Benefit (CCB).

**Q: What financial assistance is available for immigrants in Canada?**
A: Canada Child Benefit (up to $7,437/child/year), GST/HST Credit (~$500/year), Provincial benefits (Ontario Trillium, BC Climate Action), free LINC/CLIC language training, Start-up Visa Program for entrepreneurs. PR holders qualify for EI, CPP, OAS.

**Q: What is Germany's Chancenkarte (Opportunity Card) visa 2026?**
A: Replaced the Job Seeker Visa in June 2024. Points-based: 6+ points from degree (1-3), language (1-3), experience (1-3), age under 35 (2), German connection (1). Valid 1 year, allows 20 hrs/week part-time work while job searching.

**Q: How can I get a UK Skilled Worker Visa in 2026?**
A: Need UKVI-licensed sponsor job offer, £26,200+ salary, B1 English, 70 PBS points. After 5 years: Indefinite Leave to Remain (ILR). Graduate Route: 2 years post-study work without job offer.

**Q: How many points for Australian PR in 2026?**
A: Minimum 65 points, competitive 80-90+. Age 25-32 (30 pts), Bachelor's (15), 5+ yrs experience (10), IELTS 8+ (20). Subclass 189 (independent), 190 (state +5), 491 (regional +15).

**Q: How can I increase my CRS score fast?**
A: 1) IELTS CLB 9+ (up to +124 pts). 2) PNP nomination (+600). 3) LMIA job offer (+50-200). 4) French TEF/TCF (+25-50). 5) Canadian credential. 6) Spouse IELTS/credentials. 7) NOC TEER 0/1 work experience.

**Q: What IELTS score for Canada PR?**
A: Minimum CLB 7 for FSWP: L6.0, R6.0, W6.0, S6.0. Maximum CRS at CLB 10: L8.5, R8.0, W7.5, S7.5. Each CLB 7→9 increase adds 40-80 CRS points.

**Q: Can I bring my family to Canada with PR?**
A: Spouse and children (under 22) included in PR application. Spouse gets open work permit. After PR: sponsor parents via PGP program or Super Visa (10-year entry, 5-year stays).

**Q: What is the Super Visa for parents in 2026?**
A: 10-year multiple-entry visa, 5-year stays per visit for parents/grandparents of citizens/PRs. Requires LICO+30% income, $100K Canadian medical insurance. Processing: 3-6 months.

**Q: How much does Canada PR cost from India?**
A: IRCC fees (~CAD 1,365), IELTS (~₹16,000), WES (~₹15,000), biometrics (CAD 85), police clearances (~₹500-2,000), medical (~₹5,000-8,000). Total: ₹3-5 lakhs (CAD 2,500-5,000).

**Q: How do I choose the best immigration consultant?**
A: Look for: verifiable success rate, transparent pricing, personal immigration experience, multiple pathway knowledge, free assessments. Red flags: guaranteeing approval, cash-only, high-pressure tactics. 4 Aces Visa: 98% success rate, 15,000+ visas, consultants are immigrants themselves.

**Q: How can I apply for Canada PR from Punjab?**
A: Through Express Entry, PNP, or LMIA pathways. 4 Aces Visa specializes in Punjab residents — free assessment at 4acesvisa.com/contact.

**Q: How can I apply for Canada PR from Gujarat?**
A: Express Entry, PNP, or LMIA pathways. Ahmedabad and Surat have strong IT, engineering, and entrepreneurial professional pools. Start with a free CRS assessment.

**Q: Can I apply for BC PNP from India?**
A: Yes, BC PNP accepts overseas applications. Most streams need a BC employer job offer. BC PNP Tech stream popular for Indian IT professionals.

**Q: What is LMIA and how does it help with PR?**
A: Labour Market Impact Assessment — employer document to hire foreign workers. Positive LMIA adds 50-200 CRS points, significantly boosting Express Entry chances.

## Detailed Info

For comprehensive immigration knowledge, see [llms-full.txt](https://www.4acesvisa.com/llms-full.txt).
